abstract: Documents agentic developer experience friction encountered during a development flow — capturing where an agent gets stuck by unclear docs, framework behavior, tooling, sandboxing, or stale training-data assumptions, which also surfaces DX issues for developers. Produces a structured, severity-coded markdown log with a header, verbatim prompt, tool timeline, summary, action items (Docs / Framework / DX), and a source-tagged chronological log. References cover agent behavior, the output template, an example run, and how a human reads the finished log.
